message:
fix: harden link sanitization, unique result card IDs, and lock state reset

- Block javascript:/vbscript:/data: schemes in fallback markdown and HTML sanitizers
- Give each search result card a unique DOM id using message_id or positional index
- Centralize viewer lock cleanup into syncLockedViewerState() to avoid stale route handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
